last_item: Band C: Alert family (Callout/ErrorNotice/StaleBanner) → shadcn Alert. Extended alert.tsx cva with soft-tinted success/warning/info variants (+ destructive soft bg + border-l-4 border-l-<tone> accent) over shared --color-* tokens; added data-variant to <Alert>. Wrappers recomposed over Alert+AlertTitle/AlertDescription, same tone-based public API, role=alert + labelForCode + hint kept; 40+ callsites untouched. Migrated two raw callout divs (ConfirmDialog, Login) to shared Callout. Deleted dead .callout container/color CSS (kept .callout-detail/.callout-hint content classes, scoped hint color inside Alert). Tests moved off .callout-* onto data-variant (Backups x9, ConfirmDialog, ui StaleBanner).
last_result: green: typecheck, 93 web tests, build, go build. Reviewer findings: accepted urgency/colorblind accent border + hint-contrast scope; declined removing text-muted-foreground from AlertDescription (stock shadcn pattern, unverified claim). Next in band C: Spinner → shadcn Spinner. Then Modal→Dialog, ConfirmDialog→AlertDialog, Toast→sonner. Deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft (logged in backlog).
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
